page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7t.6xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. It features 24 dedicated physical cores and 24 vCPUs, paired with 48.0 GB of RAM, yielding a 2.0 GB memory-to-core ratio. The CPU includes 48 MB of L3 cache, 1 MB of L2 cache, and 48 KB of L1d cache. It supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512, AES cryptography, and SHA extensions. This instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps.

Benchmark results place the ecs.c7t.6xlarge in the average tier for most compute and memory operations. It achieves a single-core Geekbench score of 1615.0 and a multi-core score of 12002.0, alongside a Passmark CPU score of 29499.47. In memory performance, the instance delivers a read-only large block bandwidth of 129.2 GB/sec and a write large block bandwidth of 62.95 GB/sec. For specialized workloads, it demonstrates strong performance in text generation for small language models at 295.58 tokens/sec, while maintaining average performance for larger 7B parameter models at 16.14 tokens/sec. Redis SET operations reach 23.57 million operations per second.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.c7t.6xlarge offers high compute density relative to its memory footprint, making it a viable option for CPU-bound tasks that do not require massive memory allocations. The primary tradeoff is the complete absence of local storage, requiring all data persistence to go over the 12 Gbps network interface, which may limit performance for IO-heavy databases. This server is best suited for compute-intensive workloads such as web serving, software compilation, batch processing, and lightweight machine learning inference.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7t.6xlarge is a compute-optimized, x86_64 server featuring 24 dedicated physical cores and 24 vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. Equipped with 48.0 GB of RAM, it provides a 2.0 GB memory-per-core ratio. The instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, relying on a 12 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. It supports AVX-512 and cryptographic hardware acceleration. Performance benchmarks indicate solid mid-range capabilities, with a Passmark CPU score of 29499.47 and strong text generation speeds of 295.58 tokens/sec for small language models. The server is highly efficient for compute-dense workloads but presents a tradeoff due to its reliance on network-attached storage. It is recommended for web serving, software compilation, and lightweight machine learning inference.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7t.6xlarge is a compute-optimized server featuring 24 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 48 GB of RAM, and 12 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for high-density CPU workloads without local storage.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7t.6xlarge is a compute-optimized server with 24 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 48 GB RAM, and 12 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A compute-dense, storage-free instance featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and AVX-512 acceleration for highly parallelized CPU workloads.
bullet_points: 24 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores running at 2.7 GHz
48.0 GB of system memory providing a 2.0 GB per-core ratio
AVX-512 and cryptographic hardware acceleration support
12 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
Strong performance in small-model text generation and static web serving
